title: Gemma 4 Transfer Gates
description: Pass/fail thresholds and decision logic for evaluating Gemma 4 transfer readiness. Thresholds are at least as strict as Gemma 3 parity acceptance gates.

coherence.description: Coherence under steering must remain above threshold. At least as strict as Gemma 3 gate (0.80).

degeneration.description: Degeneration rate must stay below ceiling. At least as strict as Gemma 3 gate (0.03).

adherence.description: Concept adherence must show measurable lift. At least as strict as Gemma 3 gate (0.60).

language_stability.description: Language stability must remain high to confirm no language reversion.

correctness.description: Correctness must not regress below baseline minus tolerance.

decision_logic.pass: All transfer gates pass. Gemma 4 experimental sweeps may proceed to next phase.
decision_logic.fail: One or more transfer gates failed. Rollback to Gemma 3 methodology. Gemma 4 runs remain tagged experimental and non-default.
decision_logic.overall_rule: ALL gates must pass for transfer to proceed. Any single gate failure triggers rollback.

rollback_policy.trigger: Any transfer gate fails OR regression detected in Gemma 4 experimental runs.
rollback_policy.action: Stop Gemma 4 transfer experiments. Continue with Gemma 3 calibrated profiles as sole default.

tagging.rationale: Gemma 4 transfer runs must be tagged experimental and non-default until all transfer gates pass.
